Catalog/Cardiovascular/MyClip Delivery System
❤️ CardiovascularREF: MRL-CV-003

MyClip Delivery System

MyClip TEER System · Delivery Systems

Advanced delivery system with bi-directional articulation controls for precise clip positioning. Features console with multiple adjustment knobs, rotary wheel for clip angle control, and specialized grasper mechanisms.

MaterialNiTi Graspers with Anti-slip Bristles, Nylon Lock Line
Frequently Asked Questions

Advanced delivery system with bi-directional articulation controls for precise clip positioning. Features console with multiple adjustment knobs, rotary wheel for clip angle control, and specialized grasper mechanisms.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the MyClip Delivery System, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The MyClip Delivery System is constructed using NiTi Graspers with Anti-slip Bristles, Nylon Lock Line, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
